remarks.headline: NOT inlined
remarks.reason: the calling function is over the 512-instruction caller budget, and this call site is not inside a loop -- it runs at most once per call of the function, so keeping it a real call costs nothing measurable (loop-resident calls, tiny call-free callees, and @inline-marked callees still inline here)
